title: Attacks on trans identities become a strategic political tool in Brazil
content:
Speeches targeting trans people proved to be an effective tool on social media for right-wingers

Originally published on Global Voices

Illustration created by Noor, used with permission

In July 2022, Kim Flores was denied a waxing service in São Paulo for being a trans woman. Despite having a scheduled appointment, when Flores arrived at the place, she was informed that the establishment only provided waxing services for “biological women.” Flores, a graphic designer who creates social media video content, took to the internet
